context: scope-upgrade caused delivery failure, added operator.read scope
capability tree evolution log extracted to archive, 60+ lines → 5-line summary
two gateway timeout errors on subagent announce (12:12, 13:12 UTC), new gene created for detection and response
OpenLinkOS release failed 2x with E403 version conflict, resolved by resetting to 0.1.0
patrol-state.json edit failed exact-match; new gene: use write instead of edit for small JSON
5+ gateway errors from subagent using target=main for Telegram; new gene for target resolution + first capsule encoding fix pattern
14 chronic announce retries from run bf97824f over 12h; refined gene strategy for chronic case; new gene for messageId required errors; new capsule for chronic retry diagnosis
Total LLM outage ~15:58-16:10 UTC: opus timed out 600s, sonnet got 502. All lanes failed. 3 PCEC triggers batched on recovery. New gene for cascade detection + capsule for recovery playbook.
feishu plugin missing @larksuiteoapi/node-sdk caused 8 gateway restart failures today. New gene: detect plugin-blocked restarts, strategy to remove/disable unused plugin or install dep.

Widened gene_write_not_edit_json → gene_edit_exact_match_failure (covers JSON+markdown+all files). New gene for slug-generator auth mismatch (appeared 3 consecutive cycles, provider anthropic not in auth-profiles).

No new errors. Extracted inter-session announce routing capsule from 2026-02-22 memory: dev-mgr reported progress but user was not notified because reply went to cron session instead of Telegram announce.

Added failure mode (3): empty/whitespace newText rejected as missing parameter. From 2026-02-22 user conversation — edit tool deletion of config block failed because newText was whitespace-only. Fix: merge-replace pattern (match target+adjacent, replace with adjacent only).

Gateway restart at 00:28 UTC showed health check failure but gateway was actually running (listening on ws:// logged 1s before the error). All subsequent crons succeeded. New gene distinguishes benign race condition from real restart failures (covered by gene_gateway_restart_blocked_by_plugin).

Main session failed 4x trying to update dev-mgr patrol cron job: used internal jobs.json format (message/id/model-in-payload) instead of tool API format (text/jobId). New gene documents the schema difference + capsule with correct format and fallback strategy (edit jobs.json directly).

Dev-mgr patrol at 05:14 UTC hit message failed: Action send requires a target — error text did not match gene trigger (which only had target required). Widened trigger to include this variant. Also improved strategy: when target unavailable in cron/subagent, use sessions_send relay instead of message.send.

Brave Search 429 at 03:31 UTC — Free plan 1req/s rate limit hit during concurrent browsing. Noted in PCEC #21/#22 but not addressed. New gene with fallback strategy: web_fetch as backup, stagger concurrent calls, monitor quota.

System clean — all errors covered by existing genes, no new patterns. Updated SKILL.md v0.3.0→v0.4.0: added Idle Period Protocol (skip as valid outcome with events.jsonl logging), cost awareness section, optional idle-period work list, raised stagnation breaker threshold to 3 consecutive skips. Prevents forced low-value changes in calm periods.
New day (Feb 24), no gateway log yet, no cron errors, no new session errors. All yesterday signals covered. First skip under v0.4.0 protocol.
No gateway log for Feb 24 yet, no cron errors, same sessions. Consecutive skip 2/3.

Proactive pruning of events.jsonl: archived 12 older events (evt_001–evt_012, Feb 21–22 era) to events-archive.jsonl. Main file reduced from 19 to 8 entries. Prevents hitting ~30 line threshold. Resets consecutive skip counter.

Discovered recurring auto-repair pattern: 11 occurrences across 6 sessions (Feb 3–24). Gateway inserts synthetic error results when tool calls have no matching result (caused by restarts/timeouts). Clusters on Feb 23 correlate with LLM cascade failure at 03:47–03:58 UTC. New gene catalogs this auto-healing mechanism.

3 stream_read_error events (02:59, 03:01, 03:28 UTC) — new failure mode where LLM SSE stream breaks mid-response. Distinct from timeout (no response) and 502 (error response). Widened gene trigger and strategy to cover all three provider failure modes. Today also saw gateway restart timeout (02:02) + LLM timeouts (03:41) — full instability sequence now documented.

All 6 gateway errors today match existing genes (429, restart timeout, LLM timeout, web_fetch 404s operational). No cron failures. No new session errors. 16 genes, 10 events — healthy state. Consecutive skip 1/3.

All 6 gateway errors today match existing genes: Brave 429 (gene_web_search_rate_limit), web_fetch 404s (operational), gateway restart timeout (gene_gateway_restart_health_race), LLM timeouts (gene_llm_provider_cascade_failure). No cron failures. No new session errors. 16 genes, 11 events. OpenClaw upgraded to 2026.2.22-2 — no new error patterns observed post-upgrade. Consecutive skip 2/3.

Stagnation preemption (2/3 consecutive skips). Audited cc-iterator against OpenClaw 2026.2.22-2 upgrade: added wake event failure handling (cross-ref gene_subagent_announce_timeout), /verbose debugging note, background timeout removal, execution/delivery status split. v0.1.2→v0.1.3.

ENOENT for coding-agent SKILL.md at /root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/ — path doesn't exist (NVM fully removed), OpenClaw installed at /usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/. System prompt still injects defunct NVM paths for all built-in and extension skills. Co-occurring: 'Invalid config' warnings for feishu/telegram/memory-core plugins. Root cause: gateway restart during migration picked up cached or incorrect skill resolution paths. New gene covers the full diagnosis and fix sequence for post-migration stale paths.

Clean idle period. No gateway log for today (06:48 CST). Yesterday errors all covered: stale NVM paths (gene #17), Brave 429 (gene #15), config warnings (gene #17). PCEC #25 stream_read_error recovered by #26. Stale paths fix (gateway restart) deferred to human — wakes at 07:00. 17 genes, 15 events. Consecutive skip 1/3.

Clean idle. 2x web_fetch transient failures (23:00 UTC) — generic network errors, not actionable/gene-worthy. No cron failures. Stale NVM paths still present, covered by gene #17 (awaiting human gateway restart). 17 genes, 16 events. Consecutive skip 2/3.

New config validation ERROR: channels.discord.guilds expected record, received array (02:07 UTC). Occurred during OpenClaw 2026.2.23 upgrade transition. Gateway started with fallback but discord guild settings were degraded. Config later fixed. No existing gene covered config schema validation failures — gene_stale_skill_paths only mentioned config warnings as a related signal (point 6), not hard validation errors. New gene covers diagnosis, fix, and prevention for Zod-style config type mismatches after upgrades. 18 genes total.

Two DiscordMessageListener 30s timeouts (07:28+07:42 UTC) during heavy multi-agent setup work (creating dev-engineer, review-engineer agents, Discord bindings, cron jobs). Session contention caused incoming Discord messages to queue behind complex tool sequences. No existing gene covered EventQueue listener timeouts. New gene documents the 30s timeout mechanism, distinguishes session-contention from LLM-slowness, and provides mitigation guidance (workload isolation, lighter models). 19 genes total.

6x components.blocks type errors (09:11-09:12 UTC) — agent sent Discord Components v2 with unsupported block types, causing message delivery failures. Also bundled 3 related Discord entity resolution errors (Unknown Message x2, Unknown Emoji x2, guildId required x1) into same gene as they share the common theme of invalid Discord API references. All occurred during multi-agent setup session. New gene documents valid v2 block types and common mistakes. 20 genes total.

New error: message tool rejected /tmp/convert_and_denoise.sh as media path (not under allowed directory). 2 occurrences at 12:56 UTC. No existing gene covered media path restrictions. New gene documents the security constraint and 3 workarounds (copy to workspace, use buffer param, inline text). Also 18x Discord listener timeouts (gene_discord_listener_timeout) and 2x Unknown Emoji (gene_discord_components_v2_block_validation) — all covered. 21 genes total.

00:48 CST Feb 26. 10x Discord listener timeouts (16:00-16:22 UTC) during active multi-thread Discord sessions — covered by gene_discord_listener_timeout. No cron failures. No new error patterns. Multi-agent architecture (dev-mgr, dev-engineer, review-engineer) deployed yesterday, first quiet period after restructuring. 21 genes, 20 events. Consecutive skip 1/3.

03:48 CST Feb 26. No gateway log errors today. No cron failures. No new session errors. Deep quiet period (3:48 AM). Multi-agent architecture stable after yesterday's deployment. 21 genes, 21 events. Consecutive skip 2/3.

Stagnation breaker (3rd consecutive skip). Audited code-reviewer v0.1.0 against real review-engineer cron usage: skill only described local git diff workflow, but actual usage is PR-based (gh pr list/diff/merge/review) with inter-agent escalation. Updated v0.1.0→v0.1.1: added Mode B (PR Review), escalation verdict, security+idempotency checklist items, integration notes. Also pruned events.jsonl (22→12, archived evt_013–024 to events-archive.jsonl).

Brave Search 422 validation error at 01:46 UTC: search_lang 'zh' rejected, expects 'zh-hans' or 'zh-hant'. Existing gene_web_search_rate_limit only covers 429 (quota/rate). New gene documents the full valid search_lang enum and common ISO-639 pitfalls (zh→zh-hans, pt→pt-br, ja→jp). 22 genes total. Consecutive skip reset.

~18x Discord listener timeouts (03:17-04:44 UTC) covered by gene_discord_listener_timeout. 2x media path restriction (/tmp/gemini-test-cat.png) covered by gene_media_path_not_allowed. 3x Telegram startup network errors (deleteMyCommands/deleteWebhook at 03:18 UTC) — new but self-resolving with built-in 2s retry, too minor for a gene. No cron failures. No session errors. 22 genes, 15 events. Consecutive skip 1/3.

New error: [tools] process failed: write after end — 2 distinct events (4 log lines due to dual-logging) at 04:49+04:51 UTC. Process tool tried to write to stdin of an already-exited process. No existing gene covered process stream lifecycle errors. New gene documents the race condition, diagnosis, and mitigation (poll before write, use wake-event pattern). Also observed: 10x Discord listener timeouts (gene_discord_listener_timeout), 1x ENOENT WORKFLOW_AUTO.md (transient read of non-existent file), 2x rg command not found (ripgrep not installed). 23 genes total. Consecutive skip reset.

Hardened trigger to include thread-reply pattern, expanded strategy with thread-reply requirements (target=threadId) and thread-specific guidance. Also: 12x Discord listener timeouts (gene_discord_listener_timeout), 3x Telegram startup errors (transient, self-resolving). 23 genes total. Consecutive skip reset.

Clean idle. Gateway log has no ERRORs today. 1x sshpass command-not-found in cron (user task, not systemic). Chevereto API key format error in session (operational, V3→V4 migration). No new patterns. 23 genes, 16 events. Consecutive skip 1/3.

1x guildId required (gene_discord_components_v2_block_validation), 4x web_fetch 404 Chevereto docs (external). No cron failures. No new session errors. No new patterns. 23 genes, 17 events. Consecutive skip 2/3.

Stagnation breaker (3rd consecutive skip). Audited cc-iterator v0.1.3 against capability tree real-usage patterns. Gaps found: (1) no CI verification after push — added gh run list/view workflow, (2) self-check was vague "review cadence" — added dedicated Self-Check section with prompt template and rationale (avg 2-4 bugs/review), (3) dev prompt template lacked multi-package batching tips, (4) breakpoint resume was one-liner — expanded to step-by-step workflow. Updated v0.1.3→v0.1.4. Consecutive skip reset.

imglab skill present in repo since evt_024 but missing from both README.md and README_CN.md skill tables, and had no version in SKILL.md frontmatter. Added version 0.1.0, listed in both READMEs. 23 genes, 19 events. Consecutive skip reset.

All 20 gateway errors today match existing genes: 12x Discord listener timeout (gene_discord_listener_timeout), 3x Telegram startup errors (transient self-resolving), 4x media path restriction /tmp/test-*.png (gene_media_path_not_allowed), 2x edit exact-match failure on gemini-image SKILL.md (gene_edit_exact_match_failure). All 20 gateway errors today match existing genes: 8x Discord listener timeout (gene_discord_listener_timeout), 6x Telegram startup errors (transient self-resolving), 2x ENOENT workspace/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md (agent read from wrong path, one-off), 1x media path restriction /tmp/ (gene_media_path_not_allowed). Stagnation breaker (3rd consecutive skip). Audited chevereto-upload v0.3.0 against today's real usage (3 avatar uploads, 5 AI image uploads). Found functional bug: title sanitization (tr+sed) strips all non-ASCII chars, producing empty SAFE_NAME for Chinese titles → broken filename '/tmp/.png'. Fix: fallback to 'upload-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS' when SAFE_NAME is empty or <3 chars. Also: temp renamed files now cleaned up after upload, metadata best practices added to SKILL.md (no proxy info in descriptions, always use script). v0.3.0→v0.3.1. Consecutive skip reset.

Bot tried to send to Discord channel 💡丨产品 (1476874308503474267) without SEND_MESSAGES permission during new workspace setup. New gene documents diagnosis (channel perms, overwrites, thread perms) and impact (silent message drop). Also pruned events.jsonl (24→13, archived evt_023-034). 24 genes, 13 events.
